                    <img src="https://www.onixs.biz/hubfs/SIC_website_2020/images/interface/img-icon-globe.svg" alt="News icon" height="75" width="75" class="mb-3">

                    <h1>
                      CME Globex Convenience Gateways (CGW) iLink 2 mandated migration to use iLink 3: What you need to know
                    </h1>
                    
                    <div class="hs-breadcrumb-menu-wrapper" id="hs_menu_wrapper_widget_1586431419509_" role="navigation" data-sitemap-name="default" data-menu-id="28529967494">
                     <ul class="hs-breadcrumb-menu">
                      <li class="hs-breadcrumb-menu-item first-crumb"><a href="https://www.onixs.biz" class="hs-breadcrumb-label">Home</a><span class="hs-breadcrumb-menu-divider"></span></li>
                       <li class="hs-breadcrumb-menu-item last-crumb"><a href="/insights/" class="hs-breadcrumb-label">Insights</a></li>
                     </ul>
                    </div>                    

                  </div>
                  
                </div>
              </div>

            </section>
            
            <!-- Blog content -->
            <section>
              <div class="container">
                <div class="row">

                  <!-- Blog post body -->
                  <div class="col-12 col-md-8 col-xl-7 mr-xl-auto">
                    
                    <article class="mb-5">
                      
                      <p class="mb-1">
                        <small class="blog-date d-inline-block float-left">
                          <!-- Intentionally blank -->
                        </small>
                        <small class="d-inline-block float-right">
                          <a href="/insights/" title="See all articles" style="border: 0;">← Back to article listing</a>
                        </small>
                      </p>
                      <div class="clearfix"></div>
                      <hr class="mb-4">
                      
                      <div class="row mb-5">
                        <div class="col text-left">
                          <small class="blog-date">
                            June 13, 2023
                          </small>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col text-right">
                          <small class="blog-date d-inline-block mr-2">
                            Share this
                          </small>
                          <div class="addthis_inline_share_toolbox d-inline-block float-right"></div>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      
                      <span id="hs_cos_wrapper_post_body" class="hs_cos_wrapper hs_cos_wrapper_meta_field hs_cos_wrapper_type_rich_text" style="" data-hs-cos-general-type="meta_field" data-hs-cos-type="rich_text"><p><span data-contrast="none">In Q1 2024 the CME Group will be launching </span><span data-contrast="none">iLink 3 Binary Order Entry Protocol access to the </span><span data-contrast="none">Convenience Gateway (CGW) or trading futures and options on futures on the CME Globex platform.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></p>
<!--more--><p> </p>
<p><span data-contrast="none">Access to CME Globex using the FIX based iLink 2 and the SBE based iLink 3 for CGW will run in parallel from February 2024 until the end of Q4, 2024 (dates subject to change of course but this is the current schedule).</span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></p>
<p> </p>
<p><span data-contrast="none">This is a mandated migration meaning that all CME Globex market participants connected via iLink 2 access to the Convenience Gateway (CGW) will need to migrate to iLink 3 during this extended parallel run period.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></p>
<p> </p>
<p><span data-contrast="none">This is a significant protocol change: The CME iLink 2 access is based on FIX Engine implementations while the iLink 3 protocol uses FIX Simple Binary Encoding (SBE) and uses the FIX Performance (FIXP) session layer protocol. From a direct market access (DMA) SDK code perspective, it’s a rewrite rather than an update.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></p>
<p> </p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">When is it changing? Current high level milestone dates are:</span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span><span data-ccp-props="{}"></span></p>
<ul>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">8th May 2023:  iLink 3 on CGW available in New Release environment for core functionality</span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></li>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">25th September 2023: iLink 3 on CGW available in New Release environment and a new iLink certification suite will be available in AutoCert+ for pre-registered orders. AutoCert+ certification is mandatory for all client systems using CGWs.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></li>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">October 23, 2023: Production CME Request Center for self-service iLink 3 session creation</span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></li>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">20th January 2024 - 3rd February 2024: Mock trading sessions</span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></li>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">4th February 2024: Start of production parallel usage period during which CGW access will support both iLink 2 and iLink 3 sessions.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></li>
<li><span data-contrast="auto">31st December 2024: End of parallel run period and deadline for migration to iLink 3 on CGW</span><br><span data-ccp-props="{}"></span></li>
</ul>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">The migration project is well documented by the </span><a href="https://www.cmegroup.com/confluence/display/EPICSANDBOX/Mandatory+Migration+-+iLink+3+Binary+Order+Entry+Protocol+for+CGW#MandatoryMigrationiLink3BinaryOrderEntryProtocolforCGW-KeyEventsandDates"><span data-contrast="none">CME with associated guidelines and impacts here</span></a><span data-contrast="auto">.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></p>
<p> </p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">All users of the current CME iLink 2 FIX based API accessing the CME Globex </span><span data-contrast="none">Convenience Gateway (CGW)</span><span data-contrast="auto"> sessions will need to migrate to the new CME iLink 3 </span><span data-contrast="none">Binary Order Entry Protocol SBE based API</span><span data-contrast="auto">. Firms may achieve this by investing time and money in an internal development project, or use a professional supported CME iLink 3 SDK solution.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></p>
<p> </p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">The OnixS directConnect: <a href="/cme-ilink-3-binary-order-entry.html" rel="noopener" target="_blank">CME iLink 3</a> Binary Order Entry Handler SDK implementations provide an out-of-the-box solution. </span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></p>
<p><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">OnixS directConnect SDK solutions support a forward migration path for venue changes to the access protocols and APIs. OnixS provides these updates to existing users within the scope of the existing software licensing and support agreements. This means the existing OnixS of the OnixS directConnect: CME iLink 2 FIX Order Entry Handler SDK have access to the OnixS directConnect: CME iLink 3 Binary Order Entry Handler SDK within the terms of the existing license.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></p>
<p><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">The OnixS directConnect: CME iLink 3 Binary Order Entry Handler SDK implementations include:</span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></p>
<ul>
<li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="9" data-list-defn-props="{"335552541":1,"335559684":-2,"335559685":720,"335559991":360,"469769226":"Symbol","469769242":[8226],"469777803":"left","469777804":"","469777815":"hybridMultilevel"}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">OnixS iLink 3 SDK library including SBE encoder/decoder and FIXP protocol support</span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></li>
<li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="9" data-list-defn-props="{"335552541":1,"335559684":-2,"335559685":720,"335559991":360,"469769226":"Symbol","469769242":[8226],"469777803":"left","469777804":"","469777815":"hybridMultilevel"}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="2" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">Programming Guide Documentation</span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></li>
<li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="9" data-list-defn-props="{"335552541":1,"335559684":-2,"335559685":720,"335559991":360,"469769226":"Symbol","469769242":[8226],"469777803":"left","469777804":"","469777815":"hybridMultilevel"}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="3" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">Fast-start trading client reference implementation source code samples</span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></li>
</ul>
<p><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">You can read more about the OnixS directConnect: CME iLink 3 Binary Order Entry Handler </span><a href="https://www.onixs.biz/cme-ilink-3-binary-order-entry.html"><span data-contrast="none">here</span></a><span data-contrast="auto">.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></p>
<p><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">For OnixS directConnect: CME SDK Release Note updates see </span><a href="https://www.onixs.biz/release-notes/tag/cme"><span data-contrast="none">https://www.onixs.biz/release-notes/tag/cme</span></a><span data-contrast="auto"> </span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></p></span>
                      
                    </article>
